name_en: Seated Wooden Statue of Jizō Bosatsu and Two Standing Attendant Youths by Kōen (3 figures), with a Waka Poem Card Enclosed in the Jizō Statue (1 sheet)
description_en: Wooden statues classified as a tangible cultural property, comprising a seated Jizō Bosatsu and two standing attendant youths by Kōen, with an enclosed waka poem card. They are a municipally designated cultural property of Ōme City, designated on December 1, 2024. They are located at Imadera 1-540-1, Ōme City.
